name: Black Bean Soup (Vegan)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Black beans, sorted and rinsed
7 cups Chicken broth or vegetable broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the black beans in 6 cups of water overnight.
2. Drain the soaking water and place the beans in a large pot with the remaining 7 cups of chicken broth or vegetable broth.
3. Add diced tomatoes, celery, carrot, onion, garlic, bay leaves, basil, oregano, and marjoram to the pot.
4. Cook for 2-2.5 hours until the beans are soft.
5. Remove the bay leaves and blend half of the soup in a food processor or blender.
6. Return the blended portion to the pot and stir in lemon juice and sherry to taste. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Garnish each bowl with 1/2-1 tablespoon of nonfat sour cream and 1/2 teaspoon of chopped chives or green onion tops.
